name: Patient
history: Ongoing work-related uncertainty and anxiety. Married recently; the relationship included instances of physical abuse by spouse Ivan and resulted in separation. Both partners are interested in resolving issues and are attending couples therapy.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: I must not express my true feelings or desires because they will be rejected or criticized.
intermediate_belief_depression: I should not expect to be understood or supported.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of expressing true feelings and desires, self-isolation, and self-criticism.
situation: Exposed to clinical terms used to describe the husband's behavior, including 'delusional' and 'pseudo-psychotic'.
auto_thought: I am afraid I can't be good enough for someone.
behavior: Avoidance of expressing true feelings, self-isolation, and reluctance to engage in tasks due to fear of failure.
